evidence: "A feel good movie to watch when you are down."
"A feel good movie, with some tears here and there."
"It keep my BF and me on the edge of our seats..."
"The quality of the picture and the sound outstanding."
"Excellent documentary. I will watch the recent one in the movies and compare."
"scary special effects get better and better."
"Sad but inspiring. it makes you think about all the things you have and take for granted."

summary: The user enjoys feel-good movies with strong emotional messages and high production quality. They prefer fast-paced narratives that are visually engaging, while showing a tendency towards simple storytelling. Overall, their reviews reflect a deep appreciation for films that inspire and evoke strong feelings.
